allow_instructions: Routine Pi-Dev-Ops dev: pytest, tsc, py_compile, git status/diff/log, npm run build.
Local env sync via scripts/sync_app_env_from_vercel.sh after vercel env pull is expected.
Read-only inspection of .harness/spec-pipelines artifacts is fine.
block_instructions: Pause before git push --force, rm -rf outside workspace, or editing production deploy config without explicit ask.
